questionHtml:
Successive ionization energies of an element, X, are shown.

What energy, in kJ mol−1, is required for element X to reach its most stable oxidation state in ionic compounds?


A.  740

B.  1450

C.  2190

D.  7730

meta.title: Successive ionization energies of an element, X, are shown. What energy, in kJ mol−1, is required for element X to reach its most stable oxidation state in ionic compounds? A. 740
